permits.description: Install new half bath. Replace/Move/Add 7 windows. Install 1 new 4 panel sliding door. Construct a 6' dormer addition. Infill the second story space. Renovate existing interior space. Plumbing reconfiguration. Electrical reconfiguration.
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($316,686); keyword: renovate; minor: panel

llm_assessment.reasoning: The renovation is very significant ($316k) and involves structural additions like a dormer and second-story infill, but the property is owner-occupied and was purchased relatively recently in 2020.
